intent: Extract temporal fields and resource availability from a request, apply resource-availability constraints, and render the result as a weekly timeline.

fields.name: target_date
fields.description: Any date within the week to schedule.

fields.name: unavailable_resources
fields.description: Resources (people/rooms) that are off and must not be assigned.

fields.name: roster
fields.description: The standing pool of assignable resources for this team.

steps.description: Resolve target_date to its containing week (Mon-Sun).
Remove unavailable_resources from the assignable pool for that week.
Render assignments as a weekly timeline keyed by day.

rules: No unavailable resource may appear in any day's assignments.
Days are ordered Monday through Sunday.

output_contract.summary: A weekly timeline: ordered days, each with a list of assigned resources.

acceptance_criteria.text: Output covers exactly the seven days of the week containing target_date, ordered Monday->Sunday.
No resource listed in unavailable_resources appears in any day.
The timeline reads as a sensible, balanced schedule.
